name: Big Book By The Sea
notes:
First meeting of 2025 is May 25- memorial day!

A Welcoming Space for All This Meeting runs May through October Join us this summer to unlock the power of the Big Book. We prioritize creating an inclusive, supportive environment from the start. Here, everyone is valued, regardless of recovery stage. We especially encourage participation from individuals of diverse sexual orientations, gender identities, expressions, and racial backgrounds. If you've hesitated at other meetings, you'll find our space welcoming and different. Discover the Power of the Big Book Explore the Big Book's transformative wisdom with us. Sessions start with an engaging speaker, followed by vibrant discussions to share and gain insights. Please bring your own copy if you can; however, we have books available for those in need. Dress according to the weather. But be mindful that it does get cooler by the ocean faster this time of day (Spring and Fall we encourage jackets and blankets) Together, We'll Grow & Heal Our meetings aim to foster a strong, respectful community, regardless of the weather. We focus on growth, learning, and healing through mutual respect and understanding, empowering everyone on their recovery journey.

name: Clarity Seekers, Plain Language Big Book Step Meeting
notes: Welcome to Clarity Seekers, an inclusive study group dedicated to exploring the newly Conference-approved Plain Language Big Book. We aim to make the principles of Alcoholics Anonymous accessible to everyone, celebrating diverse perspectives and fostering open dialogue. By simplifying complex concepts, we create a supportive environment where members can share experiences, ask questions, and engage in meaningful discussions. Whether you’re new to recovery or revisiting the material, join us as we embark on a journey of clarity and connection in our recovery paths. Together, we empower one another on the road to sobriety.
